# GitHub Automation Agent Index

This folder contains repository automation for CI, release, publishing,
Dependabot, and PR title checks.

Start with:

- [README.md](README.md) for automation navigation.
- [../docs/repository.md](../docs/repository.md) before changing CI or local
  tooling behavior.
- [../docs/packaging.md](../docs/packaging.md) before changing release or NuGet
  publishing automation.
- [../docs/testing.md](../docs/testing.md) before changing verification
  workflows.

Changes to release policy, publishing policy, repository workflow, or
verification gates need ADR review.
